nasb.text: He wept so loudly that the Egyptians heard it, and the household of Pharaoh heard of it.

esv.text: And he wept aloud, so that the Egyptians heard it, and the household of Pharaoh heard it.

cnv.text: 於是他放聲大哭，埃及人聽到了；法老一家也聽聞這事。

ccb.text: 约瑟放声大哭，埃及人听见了他的哭声，法老家也听到了这个消息。

csbs.text: 他就放声大哭；埃及人听到了，法老一家也听到了这事。
